description: 5 - 20-12-2024 - Email from Rochelle Fisher (Deputy Director, Head of Senior Appointments and Talent, FCDO)

participants.name: Email from Rochelle Fisher
participants.role: Deputy Director, Head of Senior Appointments and Talent

text:
Talent, FCDO)

From: Rochelle Fisher PERSONAL
Sent: Fri 20/12/2024 5:04:33 PM (UTC)

To: Gerard McGurk PERSONAL ; JCS
Ce: JCS JCS
Subject: HMA Washington designate - vetting

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - RECIPIENTS ONLY

HiGerardand JCS *

The PUS’s office have authorised me to tell you that Lord Peter Mandelson has been

appointed by HMTK as the next HMA Washington. This appointment has not yet been

formally announced. | would be grateful if you can start the vetting process - | believe that as

member of the HOL, Lord Mandelson will not need DV but the role he will take up requires

STRAP. We would like him to take up post in January.

Lord Mandelson is aware that security processes will be needed. His email address is
PERSONAL

Best wishes - and a very Happy Christmas to you both.

Rochelle

Rochelle Fisher FCIPD (she/her) | Deputy Director, Head of Senior Appointments and Talent

| Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | PERSONAL |

email: PERSONAL

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - RECIPIENTS ONLY
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
